description: Composition Black knitted sweater made of 100% cotton, has a V-neck, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, printed brand detailing on upper left chest and a ribbed hemline Fitting Regular Wash care Hand wash in cold water with mild detergent Do not soak, wring or twist Dry in shade Fold and stack to maintain shape Moderate warm iron Do not iron on print or embroidery The printed brand detailing on the upper left chest adds sophisticated styling to this knitted pullover from spykar, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. Team it with shirts or t-shirts, jeans and sneakers. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 19"
